definitions.name: Pages Published
definitions.description: Total number of pages published in the current period.

definitions.name: Blogs Published
definitions.description: Total blog posts published.

definitions.name: Pending Uploads
definitions.description: Content items drafted and waiting to be uploaded.

definitions.name: Uploads Completed
definitions.description: Content items successfully uploaded in the current period.

definitions.name: Awaiting SEO Approval
definitions.description: Content items pending SEO team review.

definitions.name: Awaiting Client Approval
definitions.description: Content items awaiting client sign-off.

definitions.name: Avg. Engagement Rate
definitions.description: Average engagement rate across all published content.

definitions.name: Organic Leads From Content
definitions.description: Total organic leads attributable to content.

definitions.name: Booked Leads From Content
definitions.description: Booked leads attributable to content.

definitions.name: Projects Completed
definitions.description: Number of web/design projects completed in the period.

definitions.name: Avg. Turnaround
definitions.description: Average number of days to complete a project.

definitions.name: On-Time Rate
definitions.description: Percentage of projects delivered on or before deadline.

definitions.name: Avg. Revisions
definitions.description: Average number of revision rounds per project.

definitions.name: Avg. Local Visibility
definitions.description: Average local search visibility score across all clients.

definitions.name: Map Pack Appearances
definitions.description: Total map pack appearances across all tracked keywords.

definitions.name: Review Velocity
definitions.description: New reviews per month across all client profiles.

definitions.name: GBP Views
definitions.description: Google Business Profile views month-to-date.

definitions.name: Organic Traffic
definitions.description: Total organic search traffic across all clients.

definitions.name: Organic Leads
definitions.description: Leads generated from organic search.

definitions.name: Top Keyword Rank
definitions.description: Best ranking position for the primary target keyword.

definitions.name: Tech SEO Score
definitions.description: Technical SEO health score (0–100).

definitions.name: GBP Calls
definitions.description: Calls generated via Google Business Profile.

definitions.name: GBP Direction Requests
definitions.description: Direction requests via Google Business Profile.

definitions.name: Local Visibility Score
definitions.description: Composite local visibility score (0–100).

definitions.name: Yelp Profile Views
definitions.description: Total Yelp profile views across all client listings.

definitions.name: Yelp Listing Health Score
definitions.description: Composite health score for Yelp listing completeness (0–100).

definitions.name: Total Spend
definitions.description: Total ad spend across all channels.

definitions.name: Total Leads
definitions.description: Total leads generated from paid advertising.

definitions.name: Qualified Leads
definitions.description: Leads passing the qualification threshold.

definitions.name: Calls
definitions.description: Total calls from paid ad campaigns.

definitions.name: Form Submissions
definitions.description: Total form submissions from paid ad campaigns.

definitions.name: Booked Leads
definitions.description: Leads that converted to booked appointments.

definitions.name: Cost Per Lead (CPL)
definitions.description: Total spend divided by total leads.

definitions.name: Cost Per Qualified Lead
definitions.description: Total spend divided by qualified leads.

definitions.name: Meta Avg CTR
definitions.description: Average click-through rate for Meta Ads campaigns.

definitions.name: Meta Avg CPM
definitions.description: Average cost per 1000 impressions for Meta Ads.

definitions.name: Meta Ad Frequency
definitions.description: Average number of times a user sees an ad — fatigue indicator.

definitions.name: Google Avg CTR
definitions.description: Average click-through rate for Google Ads campaigns.

definitions.name: Google Avg CPC
definitions.description: Average cost per click for Google Ads.

definitions.name: Google Search Impression Share
definitions.description: Percentage of available impressions captured.

definitions.name: Google Avg Quality Score
definitions.description: Average Quality Score across all Google Ads campaigns (1–10).

definitions.name: Budget
definitions.description: Total allocated ad budget for the period.

definitions.name: Budget Utilization
definitions.description: Percentage of allocated ad budget spent.

definitions.name: Conversion Rate
definitions.description: Percentage of leads that converted to booked appointments.

definitions.name: On-Time Rate
definitions.description: Percentage of reports delivered on or before due date.

definitions.name: Avg. Turnaround
definitions.description: Average days from report request to delivery.

definitions.name: Reports / Month
definitions.description: Total reports produced in the month.

definitions.name: Client Approval Rate
definitions.description: Percentage of reports approved by clients without revision.

definitions.name: Monthly Leads
definitions.description: Total leads generated via Local Service Ads.

definitions.name: Cost Per Lead
definitions.description: Average cost per lead from LSA campaigns.

definitions.name: Budget Utilization
definitions.description: Percentage of allocated LSA budget spent.

definitions.name: Avg. Lead Quality Score
definitions.description: Average quality rating of LSA leads (1–10).

definitions.name: Tasks Completed
definitions.description: Total tasks completed by the team in the period.

definitions.name: On-Time Completion Rate
definitions.description: Percentage of tasks completed on or before their due date.

definitions.name: Utilization / Workload
definitions.description: Ratio of active tasks to capacity for each team member.

definitions.name: SLA Compliance
definitions.description: Percentage of tasks completed within their SLA window.

definitions.name: Avg. Task Turnaround
definitions.description: Average time from task creation to completion.

definitions.name: Open Tickets
definitions.description: Number of open IT support tickets currently in queue.

definitions.name: Systems Monitored
definitions.description: Total number of systems under active monitoring.

definitions.name: Security Score
definitions.description: Overall security posture score (0–100).

definitions.name: SSL Renewals Due
definitions.description: Number of SSL certificates due for renewal within 30 days.

definitions.name: Uptime Rate
definitions.description: Average uptime percentage across all monitored systems.

definitions.name: Avg. Resolution Time
definitions.description: Average time to resolve an IT support ticket.

definitions.name: Security Incidents
definitions.description: Total number of security incidents reported this period.

definitions.name: Patch Compliance
definitions.description: Percentage of systems current on required security patches.
